info.name: Ecommerce Distributed System — API
info.description: Full API reference for all microservices. Set baseUrl to http://localhost:8081. Collection scripts seed and save token/IDs into both collection variables and environment variables during Runner execution.

exec: var token = json && json.data && (typeof json.data === 'string' ? json.data : json.data.token);

exec: console.log('Inventory service not ready; retrying Seed Inventory for Orders ' + (retryCount + 1) + '/' + maxRetries);

item.name: Re-add Item for Insufficient Inventory Order

exec: console.log('Cart add dependency not ready; retrying Re-add Item for Insufficient Inventory Order ' + (retryCount + 1) + '/' + maxRetries);
pm.test('Re-add Item for Insufficient Inventory Order: status 200', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('Set Insufficient Inventory Quantity: status 200', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
var item = items.find(function (entry) { return entry.productId === pm.collectionVariables.get('productId'); });
pm.test('Cart quantity set to 9999', () => pm.expect(item && item.qty).to.eql(9999));
console.log('Insufficient inventory check quantity:', item && item.qty);
console.log('Order dependencies not ready; retrying Reject Order with Insufficient Inventory ' + (retryCount + 1) + '/' + maxRetries);
pm.test('Reject Order with Insufficient Inventory: status 400', () => pm.response.to.have.status(400));

item.name: Clear Cart after Insufficient Inventory Check

exec: pm.test('Clear Cart after Insufficient Inventory Check: status 200', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('Cart cleared after insufficient inventory check', () => pm.expect(items.length).to.eql(0));
